MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, M.M SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-14-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

WILLIAM PEAVEY,PR-TEM, DPADILLA,REPORTER,JMCGHEE,CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ARNOLD EVJE ATTY FOR PLTF; CURTIS FRANKLIN DEFT IN PRO PER; CASE SETTLED TERMS READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGMT FOR IMMEDIATE POSS OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 135 6TH ST #101 RENTAL AGREEMENT FORF. IMMEDIATE WRIT TO ISSUE BUT STYD TO 10/21/97 AT 5PM; IF DEFT VACATES PREM PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS/DAMAGES; IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE PLTF WILL HAVE A JUDGMT ENTERED FOR BACK RENTS/DAMAGES/ATTY FEES IN THE AMT OF $750; EACH SIDE WAIVES ALL CLAIMS; DEFT SOLE OCCUPANT; SEC DEP FORF; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, CURTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 135 SIXTH STREET #101, S.F., STAYED UNTIL OCT-21-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE PLTF HAVE AMD JUDGMENT FOR $215 BACK RENT + $10 PER DAY FROM 9/15 TO 10/21 + $165 COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST SECURITY DEPOSIT IF ANY FORFEITED TO PLTF.
